# Ori Games

> A free portal of browser games for solo play and multiplayer fun — featuring Fake It Fast (social deduction), Iron Dome (defense arcade), CityFind (geography with Street View), and more. Play instantly in 20 languages, no install required.

## Games

- [Fake It Fast](/fake-it-fast): A fast social-deduction party game for 3–8 players. Find the fake before it fools everyone.
- [Iron Dome](/iron-dome): Defense arcade game — intercept missiles, unlock power-ups, and survive waves.
- [CityFind](/city-find): Guess your location from rotating Google Street View. Geography trivia with real-world imagery.
- [Clicker](/clicker): Classic arcade clicker game.
- [Color Identify](/color-identify): Fast color-matching arcade challenge.
- [Gravity Flip](/gravity-flip): One-tap reflex platformer — flip gravity to dodge spikes and walls, collect Chronos Shards to rewind time after a fatal hit.
- [Rhythm Blade](/rhythm-blade): Music reflex game — slice colored blocks with arrow keys or swipes exactly on the beat, chain combos into a Hyper Drive score multiplier.
- [Velocity Drift](/velocity-drift): Top-down arcade racer — drift through corners to build combo and nitro, burn nitro for speed bursts, avoid sliding off the road.
- [Cyber Shield](/cyber-shield): Tower-defense strategy game — place Firewall, Antivirus, and Encryption Decoy towers on a grid to stop waves of Trojans, Viruses, and Ransomware before they reach your database.

## Info Pages

- [About](/about): Learn more about Ori Games and our mission.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Ori Games team.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle data and player privacy.

## Optional

- [Iron Dome Tutorial](/fake-it-fast/tutorial): How to play Fake It Fast — rules, hints, and strategy.
- [Join Game](/fake-it-fast/join): Enter a room code to join a friend's game.
